title: Dry Step Rescue
intendedTensionBeat: Water is visible but generous after the prior pressure level.
intendedReleaseBeat: The player gets a satisfying lower-first rescue with enough margin to feel competent.
expectedPath: Open and rescue the lower puppy first, then use obvious dock-safe clears to rescue the second puppy.
expectedFailMode: Wrong play is mostly inefficient; repeated side clearing can still tighten water but should remain recoverable.
designNotes: Recovery after L34. Make water readable and satisfying rather than punishing.
